nasb.text: Thus they buried Abner in Hebron; and the king lifted up his voice and wept at the grave of Abner, and all the people wept.

esv.text: They buried Abner at Hebron. And the king lifted up his voice and wept at the grave of Abner, and all the people wept.

cnv.text: 他們把押尼珥埋葬在希伯崙。王在押尼珥的墓旁放聲大哭，眾人也都哭了。

ccb.text: 他们就把押尼珥葬在希伯仑。大卫王和众人在墓旁大哭一场。
